title: SC Epic Orchestral Music Pack
description: This resource pack replaces several ingame tracks with epic orchestral remixes from the Synomatic Canvas YouTube Channel.
body:
Welcome to the official Synomatic Canvas Orchestral Music Pack!

This resource pack replaces several ingame tracks with epic orchestral remixes from the Synomatic Canvas YouTube Channel.

Tracks Included in 1.1:

- Cat
- Clark
- Concrete Halls
- Creator
- Dreiton
- Dry Hands
- Key
- Subwoofer Lullaby
- Sweden
- Wet Hands

1.1 Patch log:

- Discs' audio now plays like vanilla discs (around the jukebox)
- Cat and Creator have been remixed for musical quality
- Cat now ends unabruptly
- Creator has been cut around and sped up to fit in the disc's time restrain (a more permenant solution will be implemented in the future, if possible) 
- Disc volumes have been adjusted to match vanilla discs' volume
- Orchestral tracks are prioritized over newer tracks
